About Me

Data-driven.
Story-led.

I'm a data analyst who combines technical rigour with clear communication. Whether writing SQL queries to surface hidden patterns, cleaning messy Excel datasets, or building interactive Power BI dashboards — I care about making data useful to the people who need it.

I've worked in contract and remote roles where I reduced system downtime by 40%, cut processing errors by 50%, and delivered end-to-end analyses across healthcare, retail, automotive, and e-commerce.

I'm currently seeking a challenging role where I can grow, deepen domain knowledge, and contribute to data-informed decision-making at scale.

Portfolio

Featured Projects

Five end-to-end analyses spanning retail, healthcare, automotive, and e-commerce — real dashboards, real data, real insights.

All Repos →
SQL + Excel
SQLExcelMySQLData Cleaning

NexCart Sales Analysis — End-to-End Data Project

Cleaned a 500-row messy e-commerce dataset down to 303 usable records, then wrote 9 MySQL queries to answer key business questions around revenue, product performance, customer behaviour, and discount impact. Total validated revenue: $191,757.69.

Key Finding: 41% of all orders were returned or cancelled — the biggest operational red flag. South region led revenue at $53,989. Gaming Mouse topped sales with 339 units. Medium discounts (11–20%) drove the highest volumes.
View Project GitHub →
Power BI
Power BIRetailDAX

Superstore Sales Performance Dashboard

3-page interactive Power BI dashboard — YTD vs PYTD comparisons, YOY growth, profit by market, sales by segment, and top/bottom customer and product analysis.

Key Insight: YTD Sales hit 4M (+26.25% YOY) but Profit Margin dropped -0.27% YOY. Furniture leads volume but kills margin — a hidden pricing problem.
View Project GitHub →
Power BI
Power BIHealthcare44K Records

Student Health Dashboard

2-page interactive dashboard analysing health indicators of 44,133 medical students — BMI, blood pressure, cholesterol, diabetes (9.9%), and smoking (19.9%) across gender and age groups.

Key Insight: At-risk rate spikes sharply at ages 30–34. Smokers show disproportionately higher cholesterol and BP. Gender splits are near equal (50/50) but health outcomes differ significantly.
View Project GitHub →
Power BI
Power BIAutomotiveKPI

Car Sales KPI Dashboard

Dynamic Power BI dashboard with KPI cards, geo map by dealer region, body style and colour breakdowns, YTD sales trend, and YOY performance by car company.

Key Insight: YTD Sales reached $371.2M (+24% YOY). SUVs dominate at 26.91% of sales. BMW leads YOY growth at 36% among all tracked companies.
View Project GitHub →

E-Commerce Real-Time Dashboard

Multi-year e-commerce analysis built into a real-time Power BI dashboard tracking sales trends, product performance, and customer behaviour with US state geo-mapping.

Key Outcome: Geo-mapped revenue concentration across US states to identify underserved regions and seasonal purchasing patterns.
